ops.title: S1 steering reframe DONE + pushed to cc-pushback main (9220443): judge/audit rewritten pushback->steering (v6), new 'direction' category (forward face: resolves a choice the assistant raised, incl. question_answer answers), operational_directive split (logistics stays noise). question_answer carve-out + build_prompt renders question+resolved picked_labels. Golden re-decided steering|noise (40/17) per user rulings (all question_answer=steering; approval+directive=direction). v6 golden dry-run 57/57. 193 pytest + ty clean. Full v6 triage running (opus, auto-sync). is_pushback name/DB column deferred to S3 (manual migration, no backwards-compat per user). S2 (refiner {action,complaint}->{action,direction} + export) and S3 (rename cc-pushback->cc-steering) pending.
